items.headline: Hackers break into Booking.com and Basic-Fit
items.whatHappened: At Basic-Fit, hackers stole customer data from a million customers. At Booking.com they gained access to booking data of an unknown number of customers.
items.whyItMatters: It points to cybersecurity, privacy, or infrastructure risk that could affect trust, compliance, and operational resilience.

links.title: Hackers break into Booking.com and Basic-Fit

items.headline: ASML is balancing between AI chip boom and renewed export threat

items.headline: Rabo: productivity of the Dutch export sector has stagnated since 2010
